did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article discussing clinical features and non-invasive imaging tools (dermoscopy, RCM, OCT, EIS) for diagnosing nodular melanoma. While it mentions that artificial intelligence based on deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) is a promising strategy that can outperform dermatologists, it does not report that the authors of this specific study used AI to obtain their results. The paper itself does not present original experimental data generated via AI/ML.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
